title: conyza polygonata
intro: Conyza polygonata, also known as Green Flixweed or Horse's-tail Fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Conyza polygonata include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic to promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Conyza polygonata can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
